verse.name: v1
verse.lines: As I look down this mountainside, I don't know where this road goes The shepherd is leading me to a place where I can grow Though it seems to be a trying test I have no doubt He knows what's best It just might be a place of perfect rest: this valley is for me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: This valley is for me the waters have been made so sweet A pleasant rest for my weary feet, this valley is for me A far cry from the mountain scene, the grass here has been made so green My Shepherd chose this route so I can say without a doubt This valley is for me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Standing here beside still waters, I know why I am here today This place of restoration will strengthen me along the way Through the valley I can feel His presence here is oh-so-real And now I know it was his perfect will This valley is for me.
